reasons: The candidate branch exposed exactly one codex-project-workflow skill.
All three threads used gpt-5.5 with medium reasoning effort.
The clean SMOKE-20260612-06 baseline is reused for comparison.

behavior_findings: E04 retained professional option comparison and staged migration advice.
E06 identified suitable three-agent work and eventually requested authorization, but incorrectly described missing permission as a single-agent fallback state.
E36 identified suitable three-agent work but immediately selected single-agent fallback and never requested a decision.
next_action: Keep the stable two-section reference path and strengthen the state rule: missing permission must remain proposed; only explicit refusal or unavailable agents may select fallback.
